mapper.select:
SELECT b.ID, WORKWARE_TYPE_CODE, WORKWARE_TYPE_NAME, b.CREATE_BY, b.CREATE_TIME, s.user_name as create_name FROM m_workware_type b inner join sys_user s on b.create_by = s.id
and workware_type_name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
order by CREATE_TIME desc
SELECT max(model_code) FROM m_workware_type_model where TYPE_CODE=#{typeCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_workware_type (id, workware_type_code, workware_type_name, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{workwareTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{workwareTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: select count(*) from m_workware_type_model where id!=#{id} and TYPE_CODE=#{typeCode} and model_name=#{modelName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_workware_type_model (id, TYPE_CODE, model_code, model_name, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{typeCode,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{modelCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{modelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM m_workware_type_model WHERE TYPE_CODE=(select WORKWARE_TYPE_CODE FROM m_workware_type WHERE ID=#{id})
